title: beanstalk
description: configurable consumable feathers to award players temporary flight
body:
# beanstalk  

## commands

**PLAYER** (beanstalk.user)

- /flight on - enable flight if they have duration remaining
- /flight off - disable flgiht
- /flight status - show how much time they have remaining

**ADMIN** (beanstalk.admin)
- /beanstalk generate <target> <duration> - generate a consumable item for the target player that awards supplied duration
- /beanstalk status <target> - view the time duration remaining of target player
- /beanstalk modify <action> <target> <duration> - modify the targets remaining 

## usage

players with flight time duration remaining may active flight with /flight on, and then every second they are flying it will tick down, fall damage is prevented when flight expires. 

players may claim the generated item (a feather by default) to claim the duration it contains

configuration is simple and you can also customize all messages 

support given in my discord or github

https://discord.gg/DWmHjN7AVD
